title: After the Post-Mortem
relevance_summary: Audit firm discrepancies and scope obfuscation leading to potential miscommunication and oversight in security reviews

prevention.rule: Monitor for discrepancies in audit firm documentation and scope boundaries
prevention.trigger: Audit firm provides inconsistent or missing documentation

red_flags: Inconsistent or missing audit firm documentation
monitoring_rules: Monitor for inconsistencies in audit firm documentation and scope boundaries
summary: The post-mortem of Cork Protocol's hack revealed discrepancies and scope obfuscation among audit firms, highlighting potential miscommunication and oversight issues.
